name: aura-frog
description: Portable LLM OS for software engineering with hierarchical planning (beta.2 — L1+L2 conflict detection, freeze cascade, conflict-arbiter, F6 class). 15 agents, 5-phase TDD + planning T0-T4, 68 rules (3-tier), 53 skills, 21 commands, 41 hooks, 6 MCP servers. ~87% markdown.
